---
title: ""
---

<div class="hero-section">
<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Profile photo of Xian Wu" />
<div class="hero-text">
<h1>Xian Wu</h1>
<p class="tagline">MSPH Student &middot; Biostatistics &middot; Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University</p>
<p>Welcome! I am a master's student in Biostatistics at Emory University with a background in economics and applied mathematics. My research sits at the intersection of Bayesian modeling, spatial statistics, and electronic health records, with a focus on developing rigorous statistical methods for real-world public health and clinical data.</p>
<div class="badge-row">
<span class="skill-badge">Bayesian Modeling</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Causal Inference</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Spatial Statistics</span>
<span class="skill-badge">EHR Analysis</span>
<span class="skill-badge">R &amp; Python</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="section-label"><span>Quick Facts</span></div>

<div class="info-grid">
<div class="info-card">
<h3>&#127891; Education</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>MSPH, Biostatistics</strong> &mdash; Emory University (expected Jun. 2026)</li>
<li><strong>B.A., Economics</strong> &mdash; Southwest University, 2024</li>
<li><strong>B.Sc., Mathematics &amp; Applied Mathematics</strong> &mdash; Southwest University, 2024</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="info-card">
<h3>&#128269; Research Interests</h3>
<ul>
<li>Bayesian hierarchical &amp; geostatistical modeling</li>
<li>Causal inference &amp; longitudinal models</li>
<li>EHR outcome modeling &amp; survival analysis</li>
<li>Spatial statistics &amp; probabilistic modeling</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="section-label"><span>Recent News</span></div>

- **Dec. 2025** &mdash; Joined the Canon Medical PIQE multi-center cardiac CT imaging collaboration
- **Jul. 2025** &mdash; Started spatial-temporal analysis project (HUMID Atlanta) at Emory University
- **2025** &mdash; Paper published in *Journal of Theoretical and Applied Electronic Commerce Research*
- **Sept. 2024** &mdash; Started MSPH in Biostatistics at Emory University, Rollins School of Public Health
